creator: me@mortis.eu
text:
On Sun, May 15, 2011 at 08:10:19 +0000, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Please note that PR ports/157058 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/157058

Patch looks good to me, so: "I approve of it".

-- 
Met vriendelijke groet,
With kind regards,
Giel van Schijndel
--
"There are 2 types of people in this world - those who like Chuck
 Norris and those who are dead."
  -- Jus12
